examples.title: Algorithm: Process Creation
examples.description: Creating a new process using fork()
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CreateProcess
INPUT: parentProcess
OUTPUT: childProcess

BEGIN
 CREATE childProcess AS COPY OF parentProcess
 RETURN childProcess
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the creation of a new process using fork(). The child process is a copy of the parent process.

examples.title: Python: Process Creation using fork()
examples.description: Creating a new process using fork() in Python
examples.explanation: This Python code demonstrates the creation of a new process using fork(). The child process prints 'Child process created', while the parent process prints 'Parent process'.

examples.title: C: Process Creation using fork()
examples.description: Creating a new process using fork() in C
examples.explanation: This C code demonstrates the creation of a new process using fork(). The child process prints 'Child process created', while the parent process prints 'Parent process'.
